# m-dev-tools

Engine-neutral M (MUMPS) developer tools for TDD, CI/CD, formatting, linting,
testing, coverage, language-server support, and runtime library work across
YottaDB and InterSystems IRIS.

## Start here

- Human overview: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/.github/blob/main/profile/README.md
- Machine-readable org catalog: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/.github/blob/main/profile/tools.json
- Catalog schema: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/.github/blob/main/profile/tools.schema.json

## Primary workflow

For a new M application, use `m-cli` first:

1. Read `tools.json`.
2. Match the user request against `task_index`.
3. Follow the matched `primary` tool or module.
4. For new application work, use `workflow.tdd_inner_loop`.
5. Read the target repo README and `CLAUDE.md` before editing.
6. Verify with the nearest available commands: `m doctor`, `m test`,
   `m fmt --check`, `m lint`, and `m coverage`.

## Core repositories

- m-cli: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-cli
- m-cli Claude context: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-cli/blob/main/CLAUDE.md
- m-cli guide: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-cli/blob/main/docs/guide.md
- m-stdlib: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-stdlib
- m-stdlib manifest: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/m-stdlib/main/dist/stdlib-manifest.json
- m-standard: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-standard
- M grammar surface: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m-dev-tools/m-standard/main/integrated/grammar-surface.json
- tree-sitter-m: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/tree-sitter-m
- m-test-engine: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-test-engine

## Historical context

- Gap analysis and remediation strategy: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-tools/blob/main/docs/gap-analysis-and-remediation-strategy.md
- Go/Rust/Python toolchain comparison: https://github.com/m-dev-tools/m-tools/blob/main/docs/m-tool-gap-analysis.md

## Guardrails

- Use `m-stdlib` for runtime primitives before adding duplicate helper logic
  to `m-cli` or an application.
- Use `m-standard` for language semantics; do not infer M tokens from memory.
- Use `tree-sitter-m` for parser or AST behavior.
- Do not invent STD* APIs or `m` subcommands. If absent from `tools.json` or a
  manifest, identify the gap and route it to the owning repo.
